note: Research sources for the regex-playground testbed. Open issues are scanned read-only. Tune these as the product grows; until competitor/analogous repos are added, the strategist decomposes the north star into foundational work.

customer_demand.note: The testbed's own issues — features users ask for as they accrue.

competitor_gaps.note: Add repos of open-source regex/dev-tool playgrounds to mine for capabilities we lack.

analogous_fields.note: Add adjacent developer-tool repos (formatters, validators) worth transferring ideas from.
